arts.ttl: Tottenham, Arsenal and Manchester United gearing up for €50m transfer battle before month end
arts.sum: Arsenal, Manchester United and Tottenham are all gearing up to make €50m bids for Brentford’s Bryan Mbuemo. That’s according to RMC Sport, who say all three are ‘monitoring’ the Brentford star. The Bees are ‘expecting a big cheque’ to be offered this month. The French outlet reports that Mbuemo ‘arouses envy’ with his performances this The post Tottenham, Arsenal and Manchester United gearing up for €50m transfer battle before month end appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Arsenal handed clear Gabriel Jesus reality as ACL injury explained after Mikel Arteta blow
arts.sum: An Arsenal club statement read : "Further to being substituted during our match with Manchester United on Sunday, Gabriel Jesus has received extensive assessments, scans and specialist reviews which have confirmed that he has sustained an injury to the anterior cruciate ligament in his left knee. The medical expert explains that there are three grades ligament injuries, that will effect the speed of the Jesus' recovery.

arts.ttl: Transfer rumors, news: Vlahović tops Arsenal striker targets
arts.sum: The 24-year-old Serbia international is keen on a Premier League move and a deal will likely cost around €60 million, which could allow Juventus to move for Manchester United's Joshua Zirkzee . Sesko was the Gunners' priority but a winter deal for the 21-year-old would be difficult to complete, while negotiations for Vlahović to renew his contract with the Bianconeri are at a standstill.
